title: [skip-ci] Replace ExclusiveArch with ifarch
body:
The ExclusiveArch spec macro is parsed only on spec parsing level. In this particular case that means that podman-machine is generated on all arches despite of ExclusiveArch present in a subpackage. It is confusing indeed. In order to assure podman-machine is built only on certain arches we need to use ifarch spec macro, as presented in this PR. I verified it with a scratch build.

```release-note
None
```
